import { getEntityCache, type GoblEntityData } from "gobl-utils-ts";
import TransactionBase from "./base/TransactionBase";

export default class Transaction extends TransactionBase {
	constructor(data?: GoblEntityData) {
		super(data, "Transaction", Transaction.PREFIX, [...Transaction.COLUMNS]);
	}

	public static fromCache(key: string): Transaction | undefined {
		const cache = getEntityCache<Transaction>("Transaction");
		return cache && cache.get(key);
	}

	//====================================================
	//=	Your custom implementation goes here
	//====================================================
}
